sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113573" key="xelrama/cion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χελρ-ᾰμάξιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <gramGrp opt="n" TEIform="gramGrp"> <gram type="dim" opt="n" TEIform="gram">Dim. of</gram> </gramGrp> foreg., <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1026.tlg001:28" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Petron.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">28</biblScope> </bibl>; child's <sense id="n113573.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">go-cart,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:117" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.117</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
